tech_name: Oracle Data Mart Suite for NT
notes: Pre-packaged NT data mart; succeeded by Oracle Warehouse Builder then Oracle Analytics Cloud
v7 was incumbent at study time; Oracle8 launched June 1997
Released June 1997; succeeded by Oracle8i 1998 then Oracle9i
Windows NT 4.0 was dominant server OS at time; succeeded by Windows 2000
Coined by Codd 1993; still core to modern data analytics
ETL methodology still foundational in modern data pipelines
Oracle's multidimensional OLAP server; eventually merged into Oracle Database OLAP option
Ad-hoc query and reporting tool; reached end of life 2013
